verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus David, quando persequebatur eum Absalom filius ejus.   Domine, exaudi orationem meam ;  auribus percipe obsecrationem meam in veritate tua ;  exaudi me in tua justitia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִזְמ֗וֹר לְדָ֫וִ֥ד יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ שְׁמַ֬ע תְּפִלָּתִ֗י הַאֲזִ֥ינָה אֶל־תַּחֲנוּנַ֑י בֶּאֱמֻנָתְךָ֥ עֲ֝נֵ֗נִי בְּצִדְקָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Hear my prayer, O Lord, give ear to my supplications: in thy faithfulness answer me, and in thy righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non intres in judicium cum servo tuo,  quia non justificabitur in conspectu tuo omnis vivens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַל־תָּב֣וֹא בְ֭מִשְׁפָּט אֶת־עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ כִּ֤י לֹֽא־יִצְדַּ֖ק לְפָנֶ֣יךָ כׇל־חָֽי׃
verses.king_james: And enter not into judgment with thy servant: for in thy sight shall no man living be justified.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia persecutus est inimicus animam meam ;  humiliavit in terra vitam meam ;  collocavit me in obscuris, sicut mortuos sæculi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י רָ֘דַ֤ף אוֹיֵ֨ב ׀ נַפְשִׁ֗י דִּכָּ֣א לָ֭אָרֶץ חַיָּתִ֑י הוֹשִׁבַ֥נִי בְ֝מַחֲשַׁכִּ֗ים כְּמֵתֵ֥י עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: For the enemy hath persecuted my soul; he hath smitten my life down to the ground; he hath made me to dwell in darkness, as those that have been long dead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et anxiatus est super me spiritus meus ;  in me turbatum est cor meum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּתְעַטֵּ֣ף עָלַ֣י רוּחִ֑י בְּ֝תוֹכִ֗י יִשְׁתּוֹמֵ֥ם לִבִּֽי׃
verses.king_james: Therefore is my spirit overwhelmed within me; my heart within me is desolate.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memor fui dierum antiquorum ;  meditatus sum in omnibus operibus tuis :  in factis manuum tuarum meditabar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זָ֘כַ֤רְתִּי יָמִ֨ים ׀ מִקֶּ֗דֶם הָגִ֥יתִי בְכׇל־פׇּעֳלֶ֑ךָ בְּֽמַעֲשֵׂ֖ה יָדֶ֣יךָ אֲשׂוֹחֵֽחַ׃
verses.king_james: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all thy works; I muse on the work of thy hands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Expandi manus meas ad te ;  anima mea sicut terra sine aqua tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פֵּרַ֣שְׂתִּי יָדַ֣י אֵלֶ֑יךָ נַפְשִׁ֓י ׀ כְּאֶרֶץ־עֲיֵפָ֖ה לְךָ֣ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: I stretch forth my hands unto thee: my soul thirsteth after thee, as a thirsty land. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Velociter exaudi me, Domine ;  defecit spiritus meus.  Non avertas faciem tuam a me,  et similis ero descendentibus in lacum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַ֘הֵ֤ר עֲנֵ֨נִי ׀ יְהֹוָה֮ כָּלְתָ֢ה ר֫וּחִ֥י אַל־תַּסְתֵּ֣ר פָּנֶ֣יךָ מִמֶּ֑נִּי וְ֝נִמְשַׁ֗לְתִּי עִם־יֹ֥רְדֵי בֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: Hear me speedily, O Lord: my spirit faileth: hide not thy face from me, lest I be like unto them that go down into the pit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Auditam fac mihi mane misericordiam tuam,  quia in te speravi.  Notam fac mihi viam in qua ambulem,  quia ad te levavi animam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְׁמִ֘יעֵ֤נִי בַבֹּ֨קֶר ׀ חַסְדֶּךָ֮ כִּֽי־בְךָ֢ בָ֫טָ֥חְתִּי הוֹדִיעֵ֗נִי דֶּרֶךְ־ז֥וּ אֵלֵ֑ךְ כִּי־אֵ֝לֶ֗יךָ נָשָׂ֥אתִי נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: Cause me to hear thy lovingkindness in the morning; for in thee do I trust: cause me to know the way wherein I should walk; for I lift up my soul unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eripe me de inimicis meis, Domine :  ad te confugi.
verses.king_james: Deliver me, O Lord, from mine enemies: I flee unto thee to hide me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Doce me facere voluntatem tuam,  quia Deus meus es tu.  Spiritus tuus bonus deducet me in terram rectam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַמְּדֵ֤נִי ׀ לַ֥עֲשׂ֣וֹת רְצוֹנֶךָ֮ כִּֽי־אַתָּ֢ה אֱל֫וֹהָ֥י רוּחֲךָ֥ טוֹבָ֑ה תַּ֝נְחֵ֗נִי בְּאֶ֣רֶץ מִישֽׁוֹר׃
verses.king_james: Teach me to do thy will; for thou art my God: thy spirit is good; lead me into the land of uprightness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter nomen tuum, Domine, vivificabis me :  in æquitate tua, educes de tribulatione animam meam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַעַן־שִׁמְךָ֣ יְהֹוָ֣ה תְּחַיֵּ֑נִי בְּצִדְקָתְךָ֓ ׀ תּוֹצִ֖יא מִצָּרָ֣ה נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: Quicken me, O Lord, for thy name’s sake: for thy righteousness’ sake bring my soul out of trouble.

verses.latin_vulgate: et in misericordia tua disperdes inimicos meos,  et perdes omnes qui tribulant animam meam,  quoniam ego servus tuus sum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּֽבְחַסְדְּךָ֮ תַּצְמִ֢ית אֹ֫יְבָ֥י וְֽ֭הַאֲבַדְתָּ כׇּל־צֹרְרֵ֣י נַפְשִׁ֑י כִּ֝֗י אֲנִ֣י עַבְדֶּֽךָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And of thy mercy cut off mine enemies, and destroy all them that afflict my soul: for I am thy servant.
